name: emr-timestamp-archaeologist
description: 病历时间戳考古器 - 用考古学方法分析电子病历时间戳，检测倒填时间、突击补写、批处理造假等异常模式

scripts.build:python: python -m py_compile src/py/models.py src/py/parser.py src/py/stratum_builder.py src/py/detection_engine.py src/py/report_renderer.py src/py/llm_reporter.py src/py/pipeline.py src/py/config.py src/py/debug_tools.py src/py/cli.py && python -m py_compile src/py/detectors/__init__.py src/py/detectors/batch_detector.py src/py/detectors/night_detector.py src/py/detectors/contradiction_detector.py src/py/detectors/sequence_detector.py
scripts.build:all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.test: npm run test:python && npm run test:js
scripts.test:js: node --test dist/cli/tests/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Run npm run build first for JS tests'
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist/ build/ .pytest_cache/ coverage/ .ruff_cache/ .mypy_cache/ && find . -type d -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean:win: if exist dist rmdir /s /q dist & if exist build rmdir /s /q build & if exist .pytest_cache rmdir /s /q .pytest_cache
